Subject: Upcoming Earnings Report for LionTech Solutions Pte. Ltd.

Dear Investors,

We are pleased to provide an update on the upcoming earnings report for LionTech Solutions Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432K), which is scheduled to be released on 20th November 2023. Our analysts, led by Mr. Tan Wei Ming and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, have conducted a comprehensive review of the company's performance metrics.

Based on preliminary data, we expect LionTech to report a robust increase in quarterly revenue, projected to be around SGD 15 million. This growth is primarily driven by the successful launch of their new AI-driven platform, which has seen significant uptake in the regional markets.

For further inquiries, please contact Dr. Ramasamy Muthu at our office line +65 6123 4567 or via email at info@equityresearch.sg. You may also reach Mr. Tan at his NRIC S9876543Z for direct queries.

We look forward to providing more detailed insights post the earnings announcement.

Best regards,
Equity Research Team
